reviews.review_description:
Update on 2/5/25: Developer, pl let us know if you plan to put Trainer view in multiple directions? Refer to Clxb pilates if you need any ideas how to do it. What were you think how we can follow trainer if facing floor exercise like plank or different side exercise etc. ??? Very frustrating.  Again very very nice workouts and worth the price, except for this major flaw.


Update Jan 2025: I purchased it today. It is overall good for me as a beginner.  I believe it has classes for all levels. The big downside is we don't see the instructor in all directions.  For example if we a doing a plank based posture we can't see the instructor I  front. So can't see the instructions.  In some other app we can see the instructor always in all directions including on the floor as required. 

Hope the development team does this update soon

This is a fun app to workout with but there are a couple of issues. 
The trainer is a bit glitchy sometimes, as is the music. 
I wish there was a slight pause between standing and floor exercises because it’s impossible to change from one to the next instantly. 
When I requested no floor exercises due to an injury I still get them. 
When I click on pause for whatever reason it continues playing. 
I like that it’s a one off payment and not subscription based, one of the reasons I chose this app

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the kind words, and also for the clear feedback.

Really glad you’re enjoying the app overall. The points you mentioned are fair, and we’re considering an update with fixes for exactly those things.

And yes, this app is intentionally a one-time purchase. Glad that matters to you too.

reviews.review_description:
This is a great app, especially for cardio. There are a lot of different cardio options which I like, the variety of those workouts is really its strength. I also like that you can upgrade your digital personal trainer with in game currency, without micro transactions and I like that so much.

It offers strength as well, but for the things I tested so far, it's not so great for strength. For now I don't have a floor to do floor workouts, but I am building a space so I can do them and then I'll test those out as well. Another downside, I selected leave out floor exercises and the first exercise was a floor exercise. I also would like that you can select time between exercises and you know what the next exercise is, so you can prepare. This would be really great during strength, because it gives time to use something like a resistance band or dumbell. Without that, the strength exercises lack resistance to build most muscles.

The last two things I had little issues with, is that hand and body tracking without the controllers. This is very buggy and laggy and doesn't work very well, which is a shame, because with empty hands you would have your hands free for things like a resistance band. And the last thing is what I read more often, the VR personal trainers looking like giants. This is not a mature issue, but a smaller personal trainer would be nice.

Anyway this is a great app, especially for the price you pay and no subscription fee. If the issue with hand/body tracking would be fixed I would give it 4,5 starts (I know that's not possible) and if there would be room to set a timer between exercisesso there is room to add more resistance in the exercises Inwould give it the full 5 stars

developer_response.body:
Thanks, really appreciate both the compliments and the detailed feedback.

Glad you’re enjoying the cardio, variety, and the no-microtransaction progression. Your points about floor exercise filtering and prep time between exercises are fair, and we’re considering improvements there. The hand and body tracking side is handled by Meta, and if the trainers look giant, feel free to email us via verseus-games.com so we can help you look into it. In many cases, that turns out to be a Meta floor recalibration issue.

If we get those other parts improved, we’d love to earn that 5th star from you.

reviews.review_title: As a fat dude in his 50s....
reviews.review_description: I highly recommend this Fitness App for anyone desiring to be fit.  This is pretty solid.  I will be using this.

I really enjoy using this. I find the workouts a little in the easy side but I am working my way through them so hopefully they get harder. A increased variety would also be beneficial. Thinking alone the lines of fit XR. The personal trainers are amazing, so realistic.

I think my only grip with this game is the locations in which to work out. I know other games from this developer have amazing outdoor locations to workout in. But for some reason in this game most of them are inside and of these a few don't even have windows. I can't think of why anyone would put a vr headset on to out out in a windowless room, when you could be working out anywhere in the world. 

I would give this app 5 stars if the developer shared the other locations from there apps with this game or created similar ones.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the thoughtful 4-star review and the kind words about the trainers. Really glad you’re enjoying it!

On difficulty and variety: certain programs get a whole lot harder, such as the Abs programs for example. You're in for a real challenge there eventually!

On locations: Fit One was designed around clean, studio-style spaces (gym experience). We hear you on the outdoor vibe though. We’ll keep adding a few scenic spaces to Fit One over time. If you want big outdoor environments right now, xFIT features most of those, and in September there's a big new re-launch scheduled, including some pretty nice Farm-themed outdoor environments even.

Thanks again for the feedback!

PS: let us know what outdoor environment style you would like most for Fit One, and we'll see what we can do!

reviews.review_description: Honestly, I don’t understand why fitness games from Verseus Games don’t get more attention from YouTubers or influencers. Everyone seems to promote Supernatural, FitXR, or Les Mills, but rarely (if ever) mention anything from Verseus. That initially made me skeptical about purchasing, but I’m glad I gave it a shot. The app exceeded my expectations! It offers a wide variety of exercises and even allows you to customize workouts based on injuries. I highly recommend it. It's now a regular part of my fitness routine.

developer_response.body:
This means a lot to us.

We’re a only a very small team without the marketing power of the giants you mentioned, but we’ve always believed that the quality of our games can stand right next to them - and your review feels like a big, honest confirmation of that.

Thanks for giving us a shot despite the lack of hype, and even more for taking the time to write something this thoughtful.

Support like this helps more than you may realize; and it’s what gives us the extra push (and visibility) to keep building something amazing for the world of fitness  & wellness in XR.  Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Exactly What I have Been Looking For
reviews.review_description: I have been solo traveling 24/7 for the last 5 years. The Quest is very useful for me but it never quite made sense for workouts. Boxing in virtual high definition worlds is fun but it gets old quickly. I just needed a virtual trainer to show me lots of stationary body workouts to get my body moving and this is exactly what that is! These workouts are perfect on their own but it's also great to buy two 1.5L bottles of water to act as weights. Its perfect for a mobile person like me who cannot buy dumbbells unless I want airlines charging me a fortune whenever I switch countries.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the 5 stars, and the story made us smile :) It’s really cool to hear how you're using the app while constantly on the move, and those water bottles as weights is just plain awesome.
Staying fit while traveling non-stop isn’t easy for most, and we’re glad our virtual trainer makes it a bit more fun and doable. Hopefully more travelers will try it your way; you’re setting a great example! Thanks again for sharing how you use it. We love this.

reviews.review_description: It doesn't matter what you're goal is or who you are, this is perfect for EVERYONE! If you wanna lose weight, build muscle, tone up, exercise hard, exercise light, play games, even sit at a desk lol. Anyone that needs to add exercise with a personal trainer coach should get this! This is a perfect game, only one thing will make it better....a mixed reality/passthrough mode. 10/5 stars

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the amazing review. 10 out of 5 stars is the kind of energy we live for!
We love how you summed it up. Whatever your goal, whoever you are, this should meet you right where you’re at. That’s exactly what we built it for.

And just so you know, mixed reality is already available. If you don’t see it or need help turning it on, feel free to reach out to us via Discord / website / or email. We’ll get you set up in no time!
Thanks again for all the hype and support! 💪🔥

reviews.review_description: I missed the bundle sale the last time it was offered,  and I can say I'm glad I caught it this time to buy the complete set with the addition of DLC. I've been impressed since I played the first time. The hardest part is trying to fill my calorie burn rings on all workout apps. Even after I complete my workouts for the day, I'm still thinking about it and looking forward to the next time I work out. I like how engaged each workout keeps you, and going through a full workout is challenging. The personal trainers are the cherry on top, making me feel as if I'm working out with a real trainer. Their upbeat personality helps with seeing a workout through. No major issues, and the problems can be easily overlooked, which I'm sure will be fixed in future updates. I give all apps a 10/10. I'm hoping these projects will continue to be developed on, improved, and updated with new content for many years! I also recommended to everyone I know looking for ways to get in shape!

developer_response.body:
Wow, that's great to hear, and I'll share this one with the whole team! 
We love hearing how much you're enjoying the full bundle, and it means a lot that you're still thinking about your next session after finishing a workout; that’s exactly the kind of engagement we hoped to achieve.

Thanks a ton for the 10/10 across the board and for recommending us - ratings and support like this are what allow us to keep improving the apps and adding fresh content for hopefully many years to come!

reviews.review_description:
I really like it so far. If I could make a little gripe, it would be helpful to allow us to tweak our trainer's height especially for the Cardio Boxing mode. Not being at an equivalent height to my trainer caused me to have bad form in my punches and many of the punches would not register in this mode. The hit detection in this mode might be a different issue from the trainer height but I'm not sure if that would fix it or not.

Other than that, it's really good especially for the one-time price.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback and kind words! Great news - trainer height adjustments were recently added (in either the Settings or Pause menu), so this should already be fixed!

If you're still having issues or can't find the new features, make sure you're on the latest version or feel free to reach out via our Verseus Discord or email.

If everything is working now, please don't forget to update to a 5-star review - as only 5 star reviews help us to improve our games further.

reviews.review_description: Great fitness app that helps you work every muscle group in a fun way. I would like to see more trainers and locations added in the future, maybe via DLC, like they did for their other app xFIT, which is also great.

developer_response.body:
Really appreciate the kind words and 5 star rating - ratings like these help us free up resources to make more new content actually :) 

More trainers and new locations are definitely on our radar, and just like with xFIT, we’re planning to keep expanding through future DLC. 

Thanks for the great feedback; and for being part of the ride as we keep building!

reviews.review_description: I like this a lot, when it works! I have uninstalled and reinstalled twice but it keeps crashing my headset, disappointing

developer_response.body:
Ah, really sorry to hear that. We'd really like to help fix this since you like it a lot when it does work!

Feel free to reach out to us on Discord https://discord.gg/3MbwRkSZnn or email us at contact@verseus-games.com - we’ll do our very best to get you up and running again.

reviews.review_description: 61 years old and I would give it more stars if I could. I used several other workout apps but I wanted something to work out abs and upper body and with Fitness 1 you pinpoint whatever you want to focus on. I do 2 workouts with this every other day. It has been years since I actively exercised and now I look forward to workouts and never miss. I got this one because there is no subscription, but if they ever make add-ons for it, I would stay updated with them. It has been that effective.

developer_response.body:
Wow, this is amazing to hear! Truly heartwarming, because this is exactly why we started this journey—to help people stay motivated and work on their health and fitness. It’s incredible to see that confirmed.

Huge respect for your dedication—keep up the great work!

Thanks again for your incredible review! 💪🔥

reviews.review_description:
I purchased this two days ago. So far l like it. I have tried supernatural, fitxr and les mill, they are all good but I had shoulder injury after too much of shadow boxing and arm swing. This one is different. It trains different part of muscles and unlike those shadow boxing type of exercises this one does not injure my shoulder. 

I only have one issue. It is the trainer’s height. How come all the trainers are like 2 meters tall. I tried to adjust my height but that does not help. My eyes are at the trainer’s chest level.
————
I am here again to review it after 27 days of use. I really like it. It worth every penny. I especially love the new update with MR. I give this one two thumbs up.

developer_response.body:
That’s awesome—not just your first review, but also after 27 days! Super! Thank you so much! Every 5-star review allows us to improve on Fit One, so much appreciated!

Regarding the trainer’s size—there are steps to fix this through the Meta OS settings. If you can join our Discord channel or send us an email, we’d be happy to guide you through it. 

(And on top of that, we’re also working on an in-game setting so that this won’t be an issue in the future!)

Thanks again for playing!

reviews.review_description:
Hi. I just bought the game today and i was very excited to try it.. when i first launched it, it was loading then suddenly a white screen showed up and i cant press ANYTHING. i had to force restart my headset and relaunch the app again. After doing 1 workout i tried the trainer customization setting, and the game froze 😞. I had to shut down the app and relaunch again. So that was the major trouble that i had. Fyi, my headset software is up to date so i really dont know what the caused this. 
Another small improvements that maybe you guys can add are boxed targets during workout sessions.. because simply relying on hand tracking was not accurate enough. And these boxed targets are a lot easier to follow because i'll know where my hands are suppose to be. 
I really want to LOVE the app and i would love to change my ratings if the major issue above are fixed. Thank you.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, and we’re sorry to hear about the issues you encountered. We haven’t heard of this white screen problem before, so we’d love to investigate further. Could you reach out to us on our VerseUs Games Discord or Email? We’d really appreciate your help in figuring this out!

Regarding your suggestion about boxed targets — We actually use a system as you describe in our other, latest game; xFIT, powered by World of Dance. Who knows, perhaps we'll also bring cool parts of this to Fitness One once we have enough 5 star ratings to do so. (the more ratings we get, the more we can do).

Thanks again for enjoying Fitness One!

reviews.review_description:
First of all, I do recommend buying this game. It is great overall, but I have one major complaint. During many exercises, particularly on my back but sometimes on my stomach too, it is very hard to keep the trainer in view. I wish I could toggle a miniature trainer who would float in my field of view. For example, pressing the Y button makes a copy of the trainer hover in the top right corner of the display.

Also, this is purely aesthetic, but I wish that there was a barefoot or sandals option for footwear.

Thanks for the game!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your recommendation and for enjoying the game! I hope we can turn that 4 star into a 5 star soon! 

Trainer visibility – We totally get that keeping the trainer in view during certain exercises (just like with a real personal trainer) can be tricky. Right now, you can rotate the trainer using the thumbstick, but we like your idea of a floating miniature trainer - we're working on designing a solution that works for everyone, and for every device. 
Footwear options - I like that idea. We’ll add it to our list for future customization items.  Nice one.

Thanks again for your feedback—this kind of input, together with the power of 5 star reviews, helps us keep making the game even better! 💪🔥

reviews.review_description:
I bought the bundled app, I think it “could” be a good workout, but 90% of it is locked! You get one choice for environment and one trainer, and very limited workouts…looks like maybe more open up as you gain points? So far I’m disappointed.
How do you use more of the app?

Update: with recent changes, I’m enjoying the app! Thank you!!!

developer_response.body:
Hey,
Thanks for your review! 

We recently updated the unlock system after your review, and now workouts unlock immediately after completing the previous one. (at first it took 24h cool-down time). You don't need points to unlock them.

Each workout section contains multiple workout days - each of them are unique training programs. Once you complete the first workout, the next one automatically unlocks!

Hope that helps turning this into a nice 5-star review, we're doing our best to listen to every each customer and make fitness more motivating and fun for everyone!🔥

reviews.review_description: Fantastic workout program! Variety of exercise programs for everyone high intensity cardio to full body workouts and Target training.  Using it multiple times a week. Working up a real sweat and stamina.  Fitness trainers are awesome and keep you motivated. You're doing real workouts, not punching objects in the air.  Trainers are  realistic and customizable.  Looking forward to more updates.  Like Ai interaction/ conversation with trainers. Popular music tracks, more open world background like the poolside ( more motivating than being indoors) Also, would like to see more  fitness trainers with more realistic expressions. And possibly an option to select from a list of specific exercises which the trainer puts together for you... You all did an amazing job! 💪😎👊Thank You!

developer_response.body:
Wow, now that’s a review worth framing! 🤩 This is exactly why we do what we do—thank you from the whole team!

As for future updates… all I can say is, you’re thinking very, very much in the right direction! 😉

Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Been looking for an app to motivate me to start exercising every day. This seemed to fit the bill. First time trying today in MR - it's amazing having your own trainer there in your living room!  Only issue I found is that I tried customising the trainer's look but couldn't see how to save the changes and she just kept reverting back to the default. Five stars if I could figure this out.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your feedback! We're really happy to hear that you're enjoying the MR experience and that it’s keeping you motivated—that’s exactly why we do this, so it’s amazing to hear!

Regarding the trainer customization: To unlock and save changes, make sure to click on the locked icon of each item. You earn in-game currency by working out, which you can then use to unlock customization options. After you select them, you'll need to Unlock those items too. Hope that helps! If not, feel free to reach out to us on Discord or via email, and we’ll be happy to take a closer look.

We truly appreciate your rating, and just so you know—a 5-star review helps us more than anything to keep improving the game! Thanks again, and happy training!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoy using this as a backup.Howeverthe music is awful. When working out I mute the music and listening  to my playlist. Overall it is a great concept and app!

developer_response.body:
Glad to hear you're enjoying the app and have to say; playing your own playlist is a smart workaround, something we hear more often. because of this, we're exploring Spotify support for a future update :)

And who knows, perhaps we'll turn that 4 star into a 5 star then ;)  Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Great, but has room for improvement.
reviews.review_description: I enjoy the variety of workouts that this app has to offer. I like that you can customize your trainer and select environments, but that's not really important to me. When doing a particular exercise, there is really no time to switch to the next move, the trainer immediately goes to the next. You have a timer per exercise, but not really a mechanic that tells you how many reps you need to complete. I would look forward to seeing something like that in a future update. Also it would be a nice addition to include a warmup or a cool down in a workout.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for enjoying our app, and recognizing the variety we put in!

For the transition time, we understand that switching between exercises can feel too fast. The first few seconds of each transition actually don’t count toward your score—this is meant to give you time to adjust. We'll make this more clear in our next update.

On rep-count, we'll investigate how we could make that happen (so that it works for all exercises, every each one of them). Thanks for the idea!

Keep moving, keep improving! 💪

reviews.review_description: I use it every morning to complete the VR fit & box training. I love the customization and the workouts. I think it has some things to improve but I think it's perfect to the morning exercise routine.

developer_response.body: Great to hear that you use it exactly for what we had in mind -  starting your mornings with it, nothing beats a fit start to the day! Also thanks for the review  - every 5-star review helps us keep improving the game! Much appreciated!

reviews.review_title: Engaging App with Room for Improvement
reviews.review_description: The virtual trainer is a standout feature that sets this app apart from its competitors. Training with the virtual trainer feels engaging and fun, especially with the gamified elements like earning points to unlock new outfits or workout environments—these additions are excellent motivators to maintain consistency. That said, the app could benefit from a few improvements. For beginners, a introduction or tutorial for each exercise would be incredibly useful to ensure proper form and understanding. Additionally, smoother and more natural transitions between body postures during workouts would significantly enhance the overall flow. Another suggestion would be to add more interactive features with the virtual trainer, such as commands like “Stop!” or “Can you demonstrate the exercise?” These enhancements would elevate the app from great to exceptional.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words, and let's hope we can turn that 4-star into a 5-star soon! :D

Transitions – We’ve already made progress on this in the last update (for example, getting on the floor), but implementing it for all exercises takes time. Perhaps good to know; the first 5 seconds of a new transition don’t count toward your score—this is actually the trainer showing you what’s next, so you have time to prepare. (we'll make this more clear in a next update)

Interactivity with the trainer – We’re actively working on AI integration, so you’ll be able to have conversations with the trainer eventually. This will allow for more detailed explanations and a more personal fitness experience. The more happy users we have, the faster we can develop this—we’re doing the best we can.
Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: This is almost perfect—the trainer looks incredibly realistic! I agree with other reviews that a few seconds to transition between positions would be helpful. I love the customization options for the trainer, and the addition of small talk makes the experience even more engaging. In the future, it would be amazing to see an AI model integrated for real-time interactions, making the experience even more immersive!

developer_response.body:
Hi Milopisani,
Thanks for the 5-star review, much appreciated! Every 5-star review makes it easier for us to continue this work, our passion, and make our apps better and better! 

For the AI model integrated for real-time interactions in Fitness One, all I can say about that is: keep an eye on the news.. ; )

reviews.review_description:
Very realistic graphic, good workout. I highly recommend it. 
 
I have to agree with some of the other reviews....please give us 5 seconds to position ourselves next to the instructor as she can move to the next exercise at the speed of light but we can't😀

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and kind words - on the positioning of the trainer, this item has now been bumped higher on our todo list. (right now we're working on adding mixed reality btw).

reviews.review_description: where has this app been all my life? love it! love it! love it! also wonderful to see that my wish list is in the pipeline (based on dev comments on their reviews)...keen to see mixed reality and addition of AI intelligence to talk with...apart from that,  the workouts in both their fitness apps get my heart rate where it needs to be, and it's engaging enough to keep me coming back for more.

As an aging personal trainer, I find this app has pretty decent workouts.
I have the guy as my trainer, I ended up having to mute him because all he kept saying was “activate your feet” 😆 and his smile can get a bit creepy😁
There should be at least a five -ten second break between exercises to get your self set up and mixed reality would be awesome so we can add our own weights to the exercises.
Otherwise, for the price, you can’t beat it!
Thank you🙂

So first of all it’s a good fitness app and you do get a good workout in. I love that it’s no subscription because I hate those kind of apps. The instructor moves so fast when changing to different exercises it’s hard to keep up. For some of us uncoordinated people it’s hard to really catch on to the exercises. A tutorial mode would be nice just so people such as myself will be catch on to the movements and work our way up. Other than that it’s a good app and I would recommend

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind review. We're glad you're getting a good workout in. In Fitness One we added a small timer of about 5 seconds where it's not scored to give you time to get in the right position. But don't worry, towards the end of a session I miss a few transitions too.

reviews.review_description: One of the best dedicated fitness apps that doesn't require a monthly sub. Has moves like push-ups, squats, hip thrusters, and abs.. the ab workouts are very challenging.
Very good game would be 5 only for the instructor doesn't give you time to transition to the next move

Lets get this out if the way: it has plenty of small bugs (trainers hovering a couple of inches, or jump from near to far. Sometimes they repeat the same sentence for like twenty times in a row „don’t forget to move your feet“ etc.) or seems unfinished from time to time (AI generated pictures with missing fingers, very few tracks and sentences from trainers etc.)

BUT:
The fact of having a personal trainer close up, doing the chores together while showing the correct technique is absolutely stellar!!!
On top of that, you earn points by doing training sessions - which you can spend on (hold on tight folks) change the look, style and wardrobe of your personal trainer!
Guys, just get this game come on!
And work your way playfully up to a better shape!
Lets go!!!

developer_response.body:
Firstly, thanks for pointing out those bugs. We've reproduced and fixing the "don't forget to activate your feet" line and moving trainers. Should be done in the next update

Yes, you get it ;)

reviews.review_title: Great way to get moving again
reviews.review_description:
What I like the most about this app is that it is great for beginners. I haven't been in gym for years and Fitness One offers a variety of different programs, from cardio for beginners to advanced core training. Exercises are clear, and virtual trainers are helpful.

The only downside is that hand tracking sometimes isn't that accurate. But overall, it's a good way to get moving again.

reviews.review_title: Fun and engaging way to break a sweat
reviews.review_description: Fitness One XR is a fun and engaging way to break a sweat, with the added bonus of potentially clearing out some cobwebs (both literal and metaphorical) from your living room. Just remember, guys, the path to beach bod glory might still involve facing a real gym (and a real salad)

developer_response.body: Glad you found Fitness One XR and fun way to break a sweat, absolutely agree that this should supplement a IRL program and a well balanced diet.

reviews.review_description: Thank you so much for this fitness app. It is exactly what I was looking for. I love especially the nice looking and motivating trainers that are customizable. And thank you for supporting german, not many apps are doing this. I just bought the app  today and was using it for more than 2 hours and I really think that it will help me motivating to do workouts more often.

developer_response.body: 2 hours in one day is a strong effort! Remember to stretch after :) Danke

reviews.review_description:
Video gameplay on my youtube channel

This is one of 3 Fitness games released by the same company at the same time. They all have the same look and trainers but work in different ways. Fitness one is probably the largest one out of them all. You have a huge ammount of cardio and strength sessions to go through and with plenty of unlockable locations. you can setup the trainer how you want and unlock the more you play. I do find that its a shame you cannot pick your own music or anything like that. there is a custom mode where youc an setyour own routtine but not one to set how long you want a session for.

There is plenty here to keep you Fit if you are looking for a fitness game with a personal trainer.

As a guy who thrives on competition and enjoys pushing my limits, Fitness One left me wanting more. Sure, the virtual trainer kept me on track with form, which is important, but the whole experience felt kind of…flat. No virtual opponents to race, no epic landscapes to explore while I worked out – just me, some squats, and a headset.

reviews.review_title: It helped me to ease back pain so much!
reviews.review_description:
This app is a fantastic companion to my gym membership! It's perfect during those days off when the gym feels like a chore. They have over 100 programs to choose from, so I can target whatever I'm feeling - fancy for some cardio? Done! Need some back-strengthening exercises after a long day at work? There's a program for that too! Honestly, it's helped ease my back pain so much. 

Plus, having a virtual trainer keeping me motivated is a real bonus, especially when I'm working out at home. It's not a replacement for the gym, but it's a brilliant way to mix things up and fit in some extra workouts throughout the week.

Realistic virtual personal trainer keeps me motivated.
Many cardio and strength workout to choose from, and they are all good exercise.
The environment, the music and the overall atmosphere are all good.

Cool to have it on Quest3 now! I had it on Pico and i loved it. It is the best personal trainer VR App so far for me. Very motivating and positive athmosphere. Graphics are good but Quest3 can more. One Wish: Please make an option, only to have standing exercises. Sometimes there is not enough space to switch to the ground. Training with only standing positions would be perfect! Worth every Cent!

reviews.review_title: First VR fitness game I’ve brought
reviews.review_description: This is the first time I bought a VR fitness game. And I have to admit, it's not bad at all, I enjoy the environments, and the variety of different workout programs. 👍

This app us exactly what I was looking for.

Please consider adding passthrough mode, and adjustable trainer height.

developer_response.body: Yes! We're glad you found us, we've noted your request for passthrough and adjustable trainer height! It's a popular request and we hope to bring passthrough in an update soon.

reviews.review_description:
That brings fitness to the next level! I usually play with a heavy west and wrist and foot weights. With them, for example Les Mills is the better cardio workout than this one. But concerning muscles and full body workout this one is definitely the next level and varied. The girls are motivating, too. ;-P The body moves without any movement/clipping errors.
What does not work are my wrist weights because the handtracking does not work with them. But that is more of a Meta problem.

reviews.review_title: This is what I was looking for!
reviews.review_description: There are many fitness apps out there, but this is the first one I have come across like this. You start out with zero coins, but if you enjoy working out, you can accumulate more and more and have nothing to worry about. There are no in-app purchases at all and I think it's a really sound app. If I had to say a wish, I would say that I hope they keep updating it and make it something that I will never get tired of. I am looking forward to the continued development of this app!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review and feedback, we're looking forward to bringing you more updates in the future!

reviews.review_description: Very nice fitness app that closely simulates the gym experience. The only downside is that we are two people at home, and it does not allow us to create multiple users, each with their own characteristics and progress in training. Perhaps in a future update? It's quite expensive to solve this: buying two headsets and two Fitness one VR apps.

developer_response.body: Glad you're getting a gym like experience from Fitness One. We've noted your request for user profiles.

reviews.review_description: Cool game
This VR game turns workouts into a neon-lit, calorie-torching blast. Dodge fireballs, battle robots, and even dance your way to a sweat.
This game has officially become my new obsession. It's like having a sassy cheerleader disguised as a personal trainer living in my apartment lol.  Btw i was having with a capital F-U-N!

reviews.review_title: Neat game, need to try other ones too
reviews.review_description: Got this recently as a present, tried it, loved it, and I saw there is more by this developer, definitely will try those on my own budget in future lol

reviews.review_title: One of the best Fitness apps out there
reviews.review_description: Exercising is fun now and you can learn a lot!
Sheeesh.... Exercises are okay, got bit tired but game models are rendering amazingly, you just need to stop and look around the game, wow

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Our artists are very talented. We will be sure to pass on the feedback.

reviews.review_description:
This fitness app is a great addition to my Pilates workouts! Hundreds of different workouts, from cardio to sculpting, all with your 1-on-1 personal coach.

These workouts are KILLER! Target everything or simply burn calories – your call. Plus, customize your coach for a personalized feel and finally a fitness app without silly subscriptions.

High-intensity fun fitness app from your living room? Yes, please!

Imagine a personal trainer chilling in my living room, guiding my form and cheering me on. No pressure to be a beast, just gotta listen to my body and feel that strength building with each rep. Plus, proper form? Major bonus points – no more worrying about messing myself up.

reviews.review_title: Dedicated PT that is always here for you
reviews.review_description:
What I like about this VR fitness app is that it offers a personalized experience with a virtual trainer that feels like a real coach. You can customize their appearance and motivational style. The AI analyzes your form and offers real-time feedback, pushing you to improve. It's like having a dedicated PT always there for you. 

Minor hurdle: loading times can be lengthy. Overall, it's a fantastic fitness experience with an impressive program library and personalized training.
